{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231940183FCE678B1ED7B7D7543A"}"},"total":563},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610698140121137945","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"每个副本都写得很好，很细致，有脑子，每个人都有做事的理由，而且不是无敌的本，好看，嗑CP的也能进来看看[爱慕][爱慕]不磕的当兄弟情就行[偷笑][偷笑][飞吻]音凡99","text_exts":[{"e":66,"s":63,"text":"兄弟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774266018B7D7543A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610698140121137945%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227585422829441535038%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772007002,"group_id":"7585422829441535038","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"讨厌ky/无理智粉/贴脸/梦女/梦三，主攻天下无敌！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Jl8fsbbmbB4wZBsIBv78QbNtVIAotCdhD/YxGAOIe1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ae1086bc70e946f2b1dc76e9a2b87a2a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791031&x-signature=AqoFDbLgGzue6o5NfCmiye55pVk%3D","user_id":"2541671506515591","user_name":"番茄卖十日版权"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2541671506515591","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7585422829441535038","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+国运+直播+无女主】
诡异降临蓝星一年。
龙国天选者一场未胜，即将灭国，其他国家纷纷对龙国虎视眈眈。
新选中的天选者居然抽到毫无作用的F级天赋——幸运。
就在所有龙国人彻底绝望的时候，怪谈内的天选者，看着熟悉的场景，有些吃惊。
哈?这不是宝宝动画小猪佩奇吗。
扮演人设，推理互动。
当别国天玄者被诡异虐的体无完肤的时候，无音随随便便通关怪谈获得史上最高SSS级评分。
全球观众:这河里吗？
各国意识到了无音的强大，跪求龙国带领他们战胜诡异。
无音:可以是可以，但你们，都要变成龙国的小弟!","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0c7f4f88b3299f631c9ee74f3ef15ee8","author":"香辣兔","author_id":"","book_id":"7585422829441535038","book_name":"规则怪谈，请勿看到佩奇的正脸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b08888","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585423417805914686","read_count":"65466","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"361520"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"177","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,直播,灵异,国运,规则怪谈,惊悚游戏","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d91078eaa463ca48b4c6f8d84eebda64~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450018&x-signature=Libj3MAZCBCe8GLRSWnO0cODl9A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109617910423","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231940183FCE678B1ED7B7D7543A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],
